sentences.arabic: أَوْقَفْتُ سَيَّارَةَ الْأُجْرَةِ وَطَلَبْتُ مِنَ السَّائِقِ أَنْ يَأْخُذَنِي إِلَى الْمَطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Zaustavio sam taksi i zamolио vozača da me odveze na aerodrom.
sentences.translationEn: I stopped a taxi and asked the driver to take me to the airport.

sentences.translation: Pitao sam ga kolika je cijena vožnje.
sentences.translationEn: I asked him how much the fare would be.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ الطَّرِيقَ مُزْدَحِمَةٌ وَقَدْ تَسْتَغْرِقُ نِصْفَ سَاعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da je cesta zakrčena i da bi moglo potrajati pola sata.
sentences.translationEn: He said the road is busy and it might take half an hour.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ فِي الْمَقْعَدِ الْخَلْفِيِّ وَرَبَطْتُ حِزَامَ الْأَمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo sam na zadnje sjedište i vezao sigurnosni pojas.
sentences.translationEn: I sat in the back seat and fastened my seatbelt.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْنَا إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُنَاسِبِ.
sentences.translation: Stigli smo na aerodrom na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: We arrived at the airport in good time.
